sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n84394" key="pokoeidh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ποκο-ειδής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n84394.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">like undressed wool: rough, crude,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἔννοιαι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.5</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
